title: ranunculus nephelogenes var. longicaulis
intro: Ranunculus nephelogenes var. longicaulis, also known as the Himalayan buttercup, is a variety of plant in the Ranunculus genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce oxidative stress. The health benefits of Ranunculus nephelogenes var. longicaulis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tinctures, infusions, and salves, although it is essential to use caution when handling this plant due to its potential toxicity.
